top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 17-37
top_events.description: A batch of 24 satellites for the Starlink mega-constellation - SpaceX's project for space-based Internet communication system.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for a glimpse of advanced reusable rocket technology.
